comment: Microsoft CDP (Connected Devices Platform) device type byte from the Bluetooth advertising beacon. Source: learn.microsoft.com/en-us/openspecs/windows_protocols/ms-cdp (MS-CDP §2.2.2.1 Bluetooth Advertising Beacon). Pinned 2026-04-14. The device-type byte is the second byte of the beacon payload after the Scenario Type and provides a stable device class indicator.
